narrative:
Beavercreek 093 (precinct in Greene County) has 1,811 registered voters, with 49.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.1 percentage points.
